firmware.title: Android 5.0.2 System Update
firmware.description: This software update will upgrade your Nexus 10 to Android 5.0.2, which improves performance and stability and fixes bugs. Downloading via Wi-Fi is recommended. Downloading over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
